results.title: Principal Systems Engineer | CareerSync
highlights:
# Principal Systems Engineer
...
- About Carrier
...
- Carrier Global Corporation, global leader in intelligent climate and energy solutions, is committed to creating innovations that bring comfort, safety and sustainability to life. Through cutting-edge advancements in climate solutions such as temperature control, air quality and transportation, we improve lives, empower critical industries and ensure safe transport of food, lifesaving medicines and more. Since inventing modern air conditioning in 1902, we lead with purpose: enhancing the lives we live and the world we share. We continue to lead because of our world-class, inclusive workforce that puts the customer at the center of everything we do. For more information, visit corporate.carrier.com or follow on Carrier social media at @Carrier.
...
### About This Role
...
AdvanTEC is a premier team of Building System Experts at Carrier Corp. This team, part of Carrier Commercial HVAC Engineering organization and the Global Enterprise Solutions team; develops, markets, and supports sales of innovative, intelligent building solutions. The AdvanTEC team creates and deploys rapid prototypes of solutions that solve customer problems and leverage the broad portfolio of Carrier products and expertise.
...
Reporting to the Associate Director of the North America AdvanTEC team, this position will require a hands-on, self-starting person responsible to support Global Enterprise Solutions team and the Key Account Managers in North America sales team in the creation and sale of innovative new solutions. This position will also require working in close collaboration with Carrier business units for the sale and deployment of solutions in customer’s buildings primarily in the Americas and globally as needed.
...
- Work as a part of a global team to develop new intelligent building system solutions.
...
- Support the creation of customer project proposals.
...
- Participate in customer discovery sessions to identify needs and functional requirements.
...
- Utilize rapid prototyping tools, modeling and simulation and existing products, as needed, to rapidly prototype new concepts to assess viability.
...
- Utilize Carrier’s existing product portfolio in a design-assist role with customers.
...
- Perform system analysis in support of solution architecture definition and optimization.
- Design and construct minimally viable prototypes (MVP) for demonstration to customers.
- Execute solution deployments at customer sites to verify customer needs and business model.
...
- Provide technical application support to business units and customers in support of customer projects using AdvanTEC developed solutions.
...
- Required Qualifications
...
- Master’s degree with 5 years engineering system design/product development and/or application experience with a focus on building systems e.g. HVAC/Building Automation/Security/Fire systems.
- Or
...
- Bachelor’s Degree and 7+ years engineering system design/product development and/or application experience with a focus on building systems e.g. HVAC/Building Automation/Security/Fire systems.
...
- Preferred Qualifications
...
- Degree in building services, mechanical or electrical engineering
- Experience of application engineering for industrial or commercial buildings
- Solution architecting
- Strong analytical and problem solving skills
- Building and system energy modeling
- Registered Professional Engineer

- Broad technical background with experience in one or more of the following areas:
...
- System engineering/design thinking
- HVAC Systems and Applications
- MEP design experience
- Energy engineering experience
- Familiarity with the design and application of building automation systems
- IoT system design and deployment
...
3 days

results.title: Associate Director, Global DevOps, Observability Platform at Carrier - United States Remote
highlights:
Associate Director, Global DevOps, Observability Platform at Carrier - United States Remote
...
Carrier is a global leader in building and cold chain solutions, dedicated to innovation in creating healthy, safe, sustainable, and intelligent environments. The company is involved in HVAC and refrigeration systems and focuses on promoting the health and safety of indoor spaces and preserving the global supply of food and medicine through its advanced technologies. Carrier is also committed to addressing climate change and collaborates with partners to drive sustainability and energy efficiency in infrastructure. By exploring smart building solutions and energy resiliency, Carrier is making strides towards a net zero future.
...
# Associate Director, Global DevOps, Observability Platform
...
🐊 Florida, Virginia – Remote🐊 Florida – Remote ⚔️ Virginia – Remote
...
Carrier is a global leader in building and cold chain solutions, dedicated to innovation in creating healthy, safe, sustainable, and intelligent environments. The company is involved in HVAC and refrigeration systems and focuses on promoting the health and safety of indoor spaces and preserving the global supply of food and medicine through its advanced technologies. Carrier is also committed to addressing climate change and collaborates with partners to drive sustainability and energy efficiency in infrastructure. By exploring smart building solutions and energy resiliency, Carrier is making strides towards a net zero future.
...
### 📋 Description
...
• Unify Global Innovation: Identify, celebrate, and integrate localized "pockets of innovation" from global teams into the core centralized platform • Define and execute the multi-year strategic roadmap for the Global DevOps and Observability Platforms • Act as a primary liaison and advocate across global business units to drive platform adoption • Lead, mentor, and scale a global team of platform and reliability engineers • Own the overarching architecture, administration, and compliance framework for GitHub Enterprise across the global footprint • Oversee the development of a centralized, reusable GitHub Actions workflow • Define and lead the architecture of the enterprise Observability Platform to provide full-stack visibility • Collaborate closely with Cloud Platform teams to seamlessly integrate CI/CD and Observability platforms • Partner with Global Security and Compliance organizations to bake automated governance directly into the platform infrastructure
...
### 🎯 Requirements
...
• Bachelor’s degree with 10+ years of experience in DevOps, Observability, Platform Engineering, or Software Delivery • At least 3+ years in a dedicated leadership/management capacity within a global matrixed enterprise • 5+ years of strategic or hands-on experience with GitHub Enterprise administration, GitHub Actions • Deep familiarity with advanced CI/CD architectural patterns • Proven experience defining strategy and scaling enterprise-grade Observability tools (e.g., LogicMonitor, Datadog, Dynatrace, New Relic, OpenTelemetry, Prometheus/Grafana, or Splunk) across hybrid and multi-cloud architectures • Strong foundational knowledge of cloud-native architectures (Kubernetes, Serverless), Infrastructure as Code (Terraform) • Exceptional communication and presentation skills, with a proven ability to influence executive stakeholders and technical individual contributors alike.

highlights:
Carrier Globalcorporate
...
carrier.com
...
# Embedded Firmware Engineer
...
-LevelEmbedded
...
Develop firmware for intelligent building control systems (HVAC routers, gateways, controllers) at Carrier's Automated Logic division, balancing sustaining and new product development.
...
JavaScript C XML Agile Embedded Systems Scrum
...
Carrier Global Corporation, global leader in intelligent climate and energy solutions, is committed to creating innovations that bring comfort, safety and sustainability to life. Through cutting-edge advancements in climate solutions such as temperature control, air quality and transportation, we improve lives, empower critical industries and ensure safe transport of food, lifesaving medicines and more. Since inventing modern air conditioning in 1902, we lead with purpose: enhancing the lives we live and the world we share. We continue to lead because of our world-class, inclusive workforce that puts the customer at the center of everything we do. For more information, visit corporate.carrier.com or follow on Carrier social media at @Carrier.
...
### About Automated Logic
...
At Automated Logic, we've been developing and supporting intelligent building solutions that have helped customers, including small businesses to Fortune 500 corporations, operate their buildings more efficiently for over 40 years. Our products help reduce energy consumption, lower utility, operating and maintenance costs, and improve indoor air quality, occupant comfort, and productivity. Technology that supports the buildings and industry of today and tomorrow requires a wide range of talents and skill sets.
...
About this role
...
In this role, you will contribute to firmware development efforts, including the design, implementation, and support of embedded firmware for our high-speed router, gateway, and controller-type devices used in real-time commercial applications to control HVAC equipment and systems. Your expertise in embedded systems development will be instrumental in this role. You will be working within a team to develop new architectures and firmware, design modifications for current products, and communicate with other engineers as well as marketing and support personnel to ensure a functional product, and to solidify customer requirements for new and sustaining projects.
...
Key Responsibilities:
...
- Balance sustaining and new product development projects.
- Produce high quality and reliable control products for our customers.
- Work closely with hardware, validation/reliability, and manufacturing engineering disciplines.
- Contribute toward the optimization of the software development flow, tools, and processes from requirements to release.
...
Required Qualifications:
...
- Bachelor’s degree
- 2+ years of experience with Embedded Systems Projects and RTOS-based design programming
- 1+ years of experience handling C programming
...
Preferred Qualifications:
...
- Degree in in computer science and/or electrical engineering
- Development in a container build environment is a plus.
- Proficient with Assembly, XML, JavaScript to provide Sustaining support on a periodic basis.
- HVAC controls design/development experience
- Agile Scrum experience preferred, and Scrum master certification is a plus.
- Excellent written and verbal communications skills.
- Strong analytical and logical reasoning skills
- Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail
- Ability to multi-task and stay organized in a dynamic environment.
- Knowledge in network protocols such as TCP/IP
...

highlights:
# Senior Cloud IoT Software Engineer
...
- About Carrier
- Carrier Global Corporation, global leader in intelligent climate and energy solutions, is committed to creating innovations that bring comfort, safety and sustainability to life. Through cutting-edge advancements in climate solutions such as temperature control, air quality and transportation, we improve lives, empower critical industries and ensure safe transport of food, lifesaving medicines and more. Since inventing modern air conditioning in 1902, we lead with purpose: enhancing the lives we live and the world we share. We continue to lead because of our world-class, inclusive workforce that puts the customer at the center of everything we do. For more information, visit corporate.carrier.com or follow on Carrier social media at @Carrier.
...
### About the job
...
Carrier is a leading provider of heating, ventilating, air conditioning and refrigeration systems, and building controls and automation. Our Digital Products and Software team builds connected residential experiences that rely on secure, scalable cloud services and resilient device-to-cloud integrations.
...
The Infinity platform is the cloud backbone for the Residential software ecosystem. It supports backend services, API and event-driven integrations, connected-device workflows, and operational capabilities that power mobile apps, portals, and other digital products across the platform.
...
We are seeking a Senior Engineer, Backend / Cloud to help design, build, and scale the Infinity platform. This role is ideal for an engineer who is strong in cloud-native backend systems, Kubernetes-based runtime environments, and IoT-connected architectures, and who can operate effectively at the center of multiple product experiences.
...
This is a hands-on senior individual contributor role. The engineer in this position will be expected to lead technical execution in complex areas, strengthen platform reliability and observability, and act as a key daytime escalation point during U.S. business hours.
...
Key Responsibilities
...
Design, build, and maintain cloud-native backend services that support residential applications, device integrations, and platform capabilities.
...
Develop scalable APIs, asynchronous workflows, and service integrations using modern backend technologies.
...
Contribute to architecture decisions across microservices, event-driven systems, Kubernetes-based runtime environments, and cloud infrastructure.
...
Support and improve device-to-cloud flows involving AWS IoT Core and related platform services.
...
Improve reliability, scalability, observability, and operational readiness across the Infinity platform.
...
Partner with mobile
...
product, QA,
...
Contribute to CI/CD,
...
automation, release engineering
...
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a Hard Science (Physical, Life, or Applied Science).
...
7+ years of software engineering experience, including 4+ years building backend or cloud-native systems in production.
...
3+ years of hands-on experience with Kubernetes.
...
2+ years of hands-on experience with Cloud IoT Services (AWS, Azure, GCP IoT) and IaC tooling (e.g., Terraform, Pulumi, or AWS CDK).
...
Experience with IoT, telemetry, edge-to-cloud integrations, or device command and state workflows.
...
Experience with API gateways, backend-for-frontend patterns, or service mesh-based architectures.
...
ity with Kafka or other event-streaming technologies.
...
ity with observability
...
Experience using AI-assisted development tools such as Cursor, Claude, Kiro, or similar tools to accelerate coding, debugging, testing, and delivery.

highlights: About Carrier Carrier Global Corporation, global leader in intelligent climate and energy solutions, is committed to creating innovations that bring comfort, safety and sustainability to life. Through cutting-edge advancements in climate solutions such as temperature control, air quality and transportation, we improve lives, empower critical industries and ensure safe transport of food, lifesaving medicines and more. Since inventing modern air conditioning in 1902, we lead with purpose: enhancing the lives we live and the world we share. We continue to lead because of our world-class, inclusive workforce that puts the customer at the center of everything we do. For more information, visit corporate.carrier.com or follow on Carrier social media at @Carrier. Carrier is a leading global provider of innovative HVAC, refrigeration, fire, security and building automation technologies leading to safer, smarter, sustainable and high-performance buildings. The Global Data Center (DC) Vertical is a rapidly growing business focused on delivering high performance cooling and infrastructure technologies to hyperscale, colocation, and enterprise customers. We are seeking a Specialist - FP&A, to lead financial planning, forecasting, reporting, and investment analysis for the Global DC vertical. This role is central to shaping financial strategy, supporting major growth investments, and enabling operational excellence across Engineering, Operations, Commercial, and Product teams. Role Responsibilities: Financial reporting, analysis, budgeting, and forecasting as well as preparation of action plans and recommendations for business and operational decisions. Help support the month-end close process, quarterly forecast, and annual plan processes for the CHVAC North America team Provide forward‑looking analytics on revenue, margin, OPEX, and investment performance. Provides guidance on contract terms and cash implications for new and prospective customers. Assist with understanding margin and pricing implications for new deals. Collaborate effectively with accounting and other departments to drive thoughtful on spending. Maintain a detailed monthly and quarterly Investment (CapEx & OPEX) outlook by project, category (Engineering, Operations, NPD, Digital), and region. Develop, test, and implement automation solutions to streamline forecasting, reporting, and investment tracking Prepare financial review materials for senior executives and global business leadership. Partner closely with the Global DC Vertical leadership team to support strategic planning, long‑range modeling, capacity investments, and market expansion decisions. Perform special projects and ad hoc business/financial analysis where needed Required Qualifications Bachelor's Degree 1+ year of work experience in one of Carrier's Early Careers Leadership Programs (LPs) Currently enrolled in one of Carrier's Leadership Programs (LPs) with successful completion of the program in May 2026 Applicant must be US Citizen or Permanent Resident Preferred Qualifications BA/BS degree in Finance, Accounting, Business Administration, or a related field Advanced level skills developing analysis in Excel, PowerBI and/or MS Access. Proven success as a Finance professional within a growth-oriented company, demonstrated experience in driving operational efficiency. Demonstrates the highest level of integrity, honesty, compassion, and credibility. Strong analytical and strategic thinking skills. Clear and direct communicator, approachable, and an active listener. Manufacturing experience preferred Proven success as a Finance Leader within a growth-oriented company, demonstrated experience in driving operational efficiency. Pay Range The annual salary for this position is between $79,000.00 - $158,000.00 annually. Factors which may affect pay within this range include, but are not limited to, skills, education, experience, and other unique qualifications of the successful candidate. Other Compensation
